title: Lobotomy Corp. Enkephalin Hunger Bar
description: Makes your hunger bar Positive Enkephalin Boxes!
body:
Makes your hunger PE-Boxes from [Lobotomy Corporation](https://store.steampowered.com/app/568220/Lobotomy_Corporation__Monster_Management_Simulation/)

They also become NE-Boxes when afflicted with hunger

Comes pre-packaged with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) compatability
